/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/sdl/main.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/sdl/video.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/sdl/input.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/sdl/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/gba_memory.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/interrupts.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/dma.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/bios.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/m4a_stub.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/save_file.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/agb_main_stub.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/port_headers_check.c.o CMakeFiles/tmc_sdl.dir/src/platform/shared/asm_stubs.c.o -o tmc_sdl  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a -lm
